---
title: "T26 — Coupled Spin Network + Matter"
subtitle: "Arrow-of-time emergence"
---

## Objective

Couple Z₂ gauge field to a scalar field and study symmetry breaking that selects a global arrow of time.

## Status

🔴 **Blocked on T20 + T24**

## Theory

Combined action:

$$
S = S_{Z_2} + S_\phi + S_{\text{int}}
$$

where S_int = λ Σ_v φ_v τ_v

## Expected Outcome

⟨φ⟩ ≠ 0 spontaneously breaks remaining Z₂ symmetry, completing "orientability → arrow."

## References

- Paper: Section 6 (Discussion)
